name: AI Love Chat : virtual romance
short_description: A realistic dating simulation powered by generative AI! Enjoy an immersive virtual romance with lifelike expressions and voices from girlfriends with diverse personalities. your girlfriend's personality is determined based on the MBTI (Myers-Briggs Type Indicator) system.
detailed_description:
Embark on a journey to find your ideal match in LoveChat: Virtual Romance.

LoveChat: Virtual Romance is an immersive simulation game where you can meet your very own virtual girlfriend. your girlfriend's personality is determined based on the MBTI (Myers-Briggs Type Indicator) system.

You'll have the option to choose from different personality types, each representing a unique set of traits and behaviors. These personality types will influence her interactions, preferences, and responses throughout the game, making your dating experience dynamic and personalized.Choose from 16 different personalities, professions, and ages to enjoy a unique dating experience tailored to your preferences.

With generative AI, your girlfriend's emotions are vividly expressed through lifelike animations, voices, and conversations.

Share your feelings through conversation, discover hidden words to adjust your affection levels, and deepen your relationship by exchanging gifts. The game will end when your affection level reaches its peak or falls below zero.

The outcome of your love story is in your hands!
